excerpt: Get the franchise diligence packet — Want the vending franchise diligence packet (Item 19 audit template + current-franchisee call script + attorney-review checklist)?
Get the payment spec packet — Want the vending payment system spec (EMV + contactless + mobile wallet + closed-loop + PCI)?
Get the small-business VMS pack — Want the small-business VMS evaluation pack (operator shortlist, qualification template, contract checklist)?
Get the custom vending pack — Want the custom vending RFP template (5-dimension customization spec, operator scoring matrix, contract addendum)?
Get the hybrid restructure pack — Want the hybrid vending restructure pack (occupancy analysis, equipment rightsizing, commission renegotiation)?
Get the smart vending pack — Want the smart vending implementation pack (RFP template, SLA framework, QBR template, hyper-care plan)?
Get the cybersecurity RFP pack — Want the smart vending cybersecurity RFP scorecard (compliance attestations, MFA, breach SLA, audit log, pentest, disclosure program)?
Get the personalization pilot pack — Want the personalized vending pilot framework (placement fit, recommendation models, privacy architecture, opt-in design, pilot measurement)?
Get the voice vending pilot pack — Want the voice-enabled vending pilot framework (placement fit, hardware spec, privacy architecture, NLU training, pilot measurement)?
Get the loyalty playbook — Want the AI cooler loyalty integration playbook (SSO + accrual + tier-based pricing + behavior triggers)?
Get the campus caffeine playbook — Want the campus caffeine planogram playbook (sub-categories, placement weighting, finals pivots)?
Get the campus seasonal playbook — Want the campus seasonal vending playbook (calendar pivots, planogram shifts, route schedules)?
Get the alignment playbook — Want the dining-vending alignment playbook (placement, pricing, meal-plan integration)?
Get the coffee playbook — Want the bean-to-cup office coffee playbook — tier selection, supply quality, milk-system discipline, and operator SLA?
Get the bundle playbook — Want the breakroom bundle playbook — tier design, operator selection, and per-employee economics?
Get the coffee station playbook — Want the breakroom coffee station playbook — equipment tier, accompaniments, water source, layout, cleaning discipline, and subsidy structure?
Get the coffee program playbook — Want the office coffee delivery playbook — provider tier selection, equipment scoping, supply cadence, and service-SLA structure?
Get the compliance playbook — Want the Smart Snacks vending compliance playbook — SKU verification workflow, grade-level planogram templates, state overlay alignment guidance?
Get the 24/7 micro-market playbook — Want the 24/7 micro-market vending playbook — kiosk, refrigerated case bank, healthy-share, shrinkage, telemetry, and subsidy integration?
